meaning: n.山羊,<俚>色鬼,<美俚>替罪羊
examples: I roped the goat to a post.
Reaching a maximum height of 56cm the pygmy goat is essentially a pet.
A goat was standing up against a tree on its hind legs, trying to get at the leaves.
Citigroup's Sandy Weill will either go down as Wall Street's savior...or Wall Street's goat.
Hearing this description, Ms. Parker doesn't choke on her Korean braised goat and dumplings.
